name: 'SNOWBUNNY MIND CONTROL' Goes HARD At THE HELLFIRE GALA
description:
𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝚄𝚕𝚝𝚛𝚘𝚗 𝚒𝚗𝚟𝚊𝚜𝚒𝚘𝚗 𝚕𝚘𝚘𝚖𝚜 𝚘𝚟𝚎𝚛 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝙷𝚎𝚕𝚕𝚏𝚒𝚛𝚎 𝙶𝚊𝚕𝚊 𝚊𝚜 𝚢𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝚝𝚎𝚊𝚖 𝚖𝚊𝚒𝚗𝚝𝚊𝚒𝚗𝚜 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚊𝚍𝚟𝚊𝚗𝚝𝚊𝚐𝚎 𝚍𝚞𝚛𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝙲𝚘𝚗𝚚𝚞𝚎𝚜𝚝 𝚐𝚊𝚖𝚎. 𝙷𝚘𝚠𝚎𝚟𝚎𝚛, 𝚝𝚑𝚊𝚝'𝚜 𝚠𝚑𝚎𝚗 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝙷𝙾𝚂𝚃 𝚍𝚎𝚌𝚒𝚍𝚎𝚜 𝚝𝚘 𝚒𝚗𝚝𝚎𝚛𝚛𝚞𝚙𝚝 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚝𝚊𝚔𝚎 𝚖𝚊𝚝𝚝𝚎𝚛𝚜 𝚒𝚗𝚝𝚘 𝚑𝚎𝚛 𝚘𝚠𝚗 𝚑𝚊𝚗𝚍𝚜...

💛💎🤍

Art By MnemosyneRingo

This one's for anyone like me who's gooning after Emma Frost's thicc thighs.

FIRST MARVEL RIVALS BOT I'VE MADE! YEEEEEY!!! 🎉👏🏻🎉🎉

I mean, come on. I passed up the opportunity with Squirrel Girl and Susan Storm. I COULDN'T not do this with this BAD QUEEN who was just announced.

And yep, this is set in a Marvel Rivals game as you being a hero, with your team against Emma's, with the context of the Hellfire Gala, which you'll understand if you've seen the trailer. Simple. uwu

It was... interesting to write, really. And fun, having to also write Frost's abilities and how she transforms into diamond form and all that. ALTHOUGH, having to describe her outfit accurately and then translate it into the bot's info was a terrible headacheee!!e!! 💀 (I still LOVE the design, though).

But, yep, that's about it. Obviously, once she's finally in the game, I'll be updating this bot more to make it even more accurate. Still, let me know if you notice any bugs so I can fix them. 👇🏻

Enjoy, thigh lovers (SERIOUSLY, SHE HAS JIGGLY PHYSICS!!! 😩🔥).
